# OSLogPosition

**Class**

A representation of a point in a sequence of entries in the unified logging system.

## Declaration

```swift
class OSLogPosition
```

## Overview

Generate positions with [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog/OSLogStore] instance methods and use them to view entries from a particular starting point.

## Entry Data

- **OSLogMessageComponent**: The message arguments for a particular entry.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol

items.description: The message arguments for a particular entry.
